stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying with a TAS of 90 kt and a GS of 80 kt on a track of 330°. The initial wind is from 340° at 15 kt. The wind then shifts to 190° at 10 kt.

Based on this change in wind, complete the following statements:

  1. Your groundspeed is going to _____.
  2. You will need to apply a wind correction to the _____.
